    "Quantity takeoff missing – progress cannot be verified against placing drawings.",

    "Obtain and review the quantity takeoff and placing drawings.",

  "rationale": "Without a quantity takeoff or documented area count, neither progress nor compliance can be assessed. ACI 318 and ACI 117 require verification against placing drawings; missing data forces a 'needs_more_info' decision to avoid covering non-compliance.",
